title: Handling Conflicting Priorities
prompt: Your manager gives you a new urgent task while you are already at full capacity. How do you communicate this situation professionally in English?

title: Giving Feedback Upward
prompt: You notice a process inefficiency that affects your team's output. How would you raise this with your manager in an international meeting?

title: Closing a Weekly Sync
prompt: You are the last speaker in a Friday team sync. Write your two-sentence closing statement that summarizes the week and sets direction for next week.
